message:
fix(sync): correct notify_all wakeup logic and improve pool fairness

Notify::notify_all:
- Fix wakeup logic to only process active waiters with live wakers
  (waker.is_some()). Previously, the filter also matched already-notified
  entries (waker == None && notified == true), which could overwrite their
  generation and break the notify_one baton-pass-on-drop protocol.
- Simplify the filter_map to set notified=true and return waker.take()
  in a single branch

notify_bug_test.rs:
- Simplify test to focus on the core lost-wakeup scenario
- Remove redundant NoopWaker helper (use DummyWaker)
- Reduce test from 126 to 36 lines while preserving coverage

Pool (acquire fairness):
- Replace front-of-queue check with position-based fairness:
  compute waiter's position in queue and compare against available
  capacity (idle + remaining headroom) to determine eligibility
- Both acquire_idle_or_none and try_create_new use the same
  pos < available check, preventing queue-jumping
- Use position-based remove(idx) instead of retain() for O(1)
  targeted waiter removal

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
